## Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] Taxonomy update
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Example update
- [ ] Template request/support
- [ ] Repo maintenance

## Public-safety checklist

- [ ] No secrets or credentials
- [ ] No employer-specific/confidential content
- [ ] No private personal data
- [ ] No unsanitized runtime logs, traces, memory, or state
- [ ] Framework-neutral language preserved where appropriate

## Validation

- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] Links reviewed
- [ ] Markdown reviewed
